2026-06-18PMOOfficial Residences ActOrder fixing the remuneration of the Special Assistant at the Prime Minister's official residence.Order fixing the remuneration of Daniela Visean, Special Assistant at the Prime Minister's official residence, effective May 11, 2026.N/A
subject: Order fixing the remuneration of the Special Assistant at the Prime Minister's official residence.
precis: Order fixing the remuneration of Daniela Visean, Special Assistant at the Prime Minister's official residence, effective May 11, 2026.
